title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Marketplace Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
